query:
-- Validation: Check conversations where lastFromMe=1 but lastStatus is null/pending
SELECT 
  COUNT(*) as total_conversations,
  SUM(CASE WHEN lastFromMe = 1 AND (lastStatus IS NULL OR lastStatus = '' OR lastStatus = 'pending') THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as stale_fromme_status,
  SUM(CASE WHEN lastStatus IS NULL OR lastStatus = '' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as null_status,
  SUM(CASE WHEN lastFromMe = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as fromme_conversations,
  SUM(CASE WHEN lastStatus = 'sent' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as status_sent,
  SUM(CASE WHEN lastStatus = 'delivered' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as status_delivered,
  SUM(CASE WHEN lastStatus = 'read' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as status_read,
  SUM(CASE WHEN lastStatus = 'received' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as status_received
FROM wa_conversations;

  SUM(CASE WHEN lastStatus IS NULL OR lastStatus = '' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as null_status,
  SUM(CASE WHEN lastFromMe = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as fromme_conversations,
  SUM(CASE WHEN lastStatus = 'sent' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as status_sent,
  SUM(CASE WHEN lastStatus = 'delivered' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as status_delivered,
  SUM(CASE WHEN lastStatus = 'read' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as status_read,
  SUM(CASE WHEN lastStatus = 'received' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as status_received
